Powerful cold email outreach platform wi: Potente piattaforma di outreach email a freddo con rotazione multi-account, riscaldamento email, casella unificata e analisi avanzate.
To obtain your API key:\n1. Log in to yo:
Per ottenere la tua chiave API:
1. Accedi al tuo account SmartLead
2. Vai su **Impostazioni → Impostazioni generali → API**
3. Copia la tua chiave API

La chiave API viene passata come parametro di query in tutte le richieste API.
Create a new cold email campaign in Smar: Crea una nuova campagna email a freddo in SmartLead
Add one or more leads to a campaign with: Aggiungi uno o più lead a una campagna con validazione e deduplicazione. Massimo 400 lead per richiesta.
Retrieve comprehensive analytics for a c: Recupera analisi complete per una campagna, incluse percentuali di apertura, clic, risposta e statistiche di coinvolgimento.
Update campaign settings including track: Aggiorna le impostazioni della campagna, inclusi tracciamento, limiti di invio e condizioni di arresto.
Name of the campaign. Defaults to \"Unti: Name of the campaign. Defaults to "Untitled Campaign" if not provided.
Associate the campaign with a specific c: Associate the campaign with a specific client (for agency/white-label accounts). Leave empty to use your default.
The ID of the campaign to add leads to: The ID of the campaign to add leads to
The ID of the campaign to get statistics: The ID of the campaign to get statistics for
The ID of the campaign to update: The ID of the campaign to update
Allow the same lead in multiple campaign: Allow the same lead in multiple campaigns
When to stop emailing a lead: When to stop emailing a lead
Custom unsubscribe text added to campaig: Custom unsubscribe text added to campaign emails
Use AI to intelligently pair leads with: Use AI to intelligently pair leads with optimal email accounts
Send emails as plain text for better del: Send emails as plain text for better deliverability with technical audiences
Percentage of leads to follow up with (0: Percentage of leads to follow up with (0-100)
